title: myosotis decumbens subsp. rifana
intro: Myosotis decumbens subsp. rifana, also known as Rif's yellow viollet, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and the Mediterranean area. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myosotis decumbens subsp. rifana include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, and it can be prepared as a tea or used in infusions, as well as being incorporated into ointments and salves.
